{"id":"project-LICHEN-ex1z","title":"_window_bitmap does not account for All-1 tile position","description":"File: python/src/lichen/schc/reassembly.py:111-113

The _window_bitmap() method computes the bitmap by checking self._tiles:
  return tuple(base + p in self._tiles for p in range(self.window_size))

However, the All-1 fragment's payload is stored separately in self._all1_payload (line 136), NOT in self._tiles. This means the bitmap position corresponding to the All-1 tile is always False, even when the All-1 fragment was received.

Example with 10 tiles (0-9), window_size=7:
- Window 1 contains tiles 7, 8, and All-1 (at index 9)
- _window_bitmap(1) checks indices 7-13 in _tiles
- Index 9 (All-1) is NOT in _tiles, so bitmap[2] = False

When MIC fails and NACK is sent, the sender will retransmit All-1 unnecessarily if tiles 7-8 are marked received but position 2 (All-1) shows as missing.

Fix: Track All-1's logical position and include it in the bitmap calculation when _all1_seen is True and the window matches _all1_window.

Category: PROTOCOL","status":"open","priority":2,"issue_type":"bug","owner":"me@mark.atwood.name","created_at":"2026-07-12T06:28:30.961908Z","created_by":"Mark Atwood","updated_at":"2026-07-12T06:28:30.961942Z"}

{"id":"project-LICHEN-ex1z","title":"_window_bitmap does not account for All-1 tile position","description":"File: python/src/lichen/schc/reassembly.py:111-113

The _window_bitmap() method computes the bitmap by checking self._tiles:
  return tuple(base + p in self._tiles for p in range(self.window_size))

However, the All-1 fragment's payload is stored separately in self._all1_payload (line 136), NOT in self._tiles. This means the bitmap position corresponding to the All-1 tile is always False, even when the All-1 fragment was received.

Example with 10 tiles (0-9), window_size=7:
- Window 1 contains tiles 7, 8, and All-1 (at index 9)
- _window_bitmap(1) checks indices 7-13 in _tiles
- Index 9 (All-1) is NOT in _tiles, so bitmap[2] = False

When MIC fails and NACK is sent, the sender will retransmit All-1 unnecessarily if tiles 7-8 are marked received but position 2 (All-1) shows as missing.

Fix: Track All-1's logical position and include it in the bitmap calculation when _all1_seen is True and the window matches _all1_window.

Category: PROTOCOL","status":"in_progress","priority":2,"issue_type":"bug","assignee":"AI Agent","owner":"me@mark.atwood.name","created_at":"2026-07-12T06:28:30.961908Z","created_by":"Mark Atwood","updated_at":"2026-07-22T20:19:15.036716087Z","started_at":"2026-07-22T20:19:15.036716087Z","lease_expires_at":"2026-07-22T20:24:15.036716087Z","heartbeat_at":"2026-07-22T20:19:15.036716087Z"}

new_value: _window_bitmap_with_all1 already handles All-1 position after MIC verification
